ab: yako kaysa’an hinSayboSi: o ’aehae’ potngor ray kakiSka:atan.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: kiSka:at ila kamatortoroe’ kaS’abo’ ray kakiSka:atan kamatilhael Sa’ “’in’itol! te’en!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: ray ’am kiSka:at, kamatortoroe’ tomotoroe’ ’iniya’om nom Sempe: kapayaka:i’.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the SaySiyat language of numbers.

ab: yami tani kamatortoroe’ kiSka:at, yami ma:tol ila nom Sempe: kapa:tol.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.
I have learned many SaySiyat languages.

ab: ya:o sa’sa’ih ka hahila: rima’ kiSka:at, ya:o sa’sa’ih ka hahila: tatoroe’ ka kapayaka:i’ ya:o ’am manabih pakbaezae’ hi ’oya’.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the SaySiyat language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
